subject: DMaaP MR fixes
commit_message:
DMaaP MR fixes

evert Kafka Docker image to onap/dmaap/kafka111:1.0.1
Changes related to AAF image changes
Fix the logback.xml errors
Enhancements to ZooKeeper ensemble and Kafka cluster lookup
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1272
Change-Id: I53e9cff94c9ccf83f82383fe865f31d16f5416bc
Signed-off-by: su622b <su622b@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 11 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2680/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/2680
Patch Set 2: Published edit on patch set 1.

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 11 on the queue.
